title: Ordni dwar it-Test Malti tal-Acquis tal-Unjoni Ewropea
title_en: Ordni dwar it-Test Malti tal-Acquis tal-Unjoni Ewropea
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/460.3/mlt, expression eli/sl/460.3/20111130/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 49 tal-2004
provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dan l-Ordni hu Ordni dwar it-Test Malti talAcquis tal-Unjoni Ewropea.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
It-test Malti awtorizzat tal-parti operattiva tar-Regolamenti
u d-Direttivi tal-Unjoni Ewropea ser ikun, mill-1 ta’ Mejju 2004,
aċċessibbli fuq il-website hawn indikata:

Website.

http://eur-lex.europa.eu/browse/directories/
legislation.html?locale=mt
